title: EVANGELION:30;
wikitext:
{{Stub}}

'''EVANGELION:30;''' is an event to commemorate the 30-year anniversary of the Evangelion franchise. It featured extensive collections and expositions, stage greetings with all Eva staff, as well as an exclusive 13-minute short video centered on [[Asuka]].
html:
This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!


EVANGELION:30; is an event to commemorate the 30-year anniversary of the Evangelion franchise. It featured extensive collections and expositions, stage greetings with all Eva staff, as well as an exclusive 13-minute short video centered on Asuka.
summary: EVANGELION:30; is an event to commemorate the 30-year anniversary of the Evangelion franchise. It featured extensive collections and expositions, stage greetings with all Eva staff, as well as an exclusive 13-minute short video centered on Asuka.

chunks.content:
Article: EVANGELION:30;
EVANGELION:30; is an event to commemorate the 30-year anniversary of the Evangelion franchise. It featured extensive collections and expositions, stage greetings with all Eva staff, as well as an exclusive 13-minute short video centered on Asuka.
